title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They have tried resetting their password multiple times but still cannot access the dashboard.

title: Payment Failed During Checkout
description: Customer reports that their credit card payment fails at checkout despite sufficient funds and multiple attempts.

title: Bug in Mobile App - Crash on Launch
description: The mobile app crashes immediately after opening on iOS 17 devices.

title: Unable to Update Profile Information
description: Customer receives an error message when trying to update their phone number and address in account settings.

title: Email Notifications Not Received
description: Customer is not receiving email notifications for order confirmations or password resets.

title: Subscription Cancellation Issue
description: Customer attempted to cancel their subscription but was still charged for the next billing cycle.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Not Working
description: Customer is not receiving the SMS verification code required for login.

title: Incorrect Billing Amount
description: Customer was charged twice for the same order and is requesting a refund.

title: Feature Request - Dark Mode
description: Customer is requesting a dark mode feature for the web dashboard to improve usability at night.

title: Slow Page Loading Times
description: Customer reports that pages take over 10 seconds to load when navigating between sections.

title: Account Locked After Multiple Attempts
description: Customer's account was locked after several failed login attempts and needs assistance unlocking it.

title: File Upload Failing
description: Customer cannot upload PDF files larger than 5MB despite documentation stating a 20MB limit.

title: Data Sync Issue Between Devices
description: Customer reports that updates made on desktop are not syncing to the mobile app.

title: Error 500 on Reports Page
description: Customer encounters a 500 internal server error when trying to generate monthly reports.

title: Unable to Redeem Promo Code
description: Customer reports that a valid promo code shows as expired during checkout.
